goal: Implement the valuation & analysis slice per the P6 contract: fair value worksheet (pe_multiple, dividend_discount_simple, growth_adjusted_pe with explicit user-supplied assumptions labelled draft) plus price/volume indicators (z-score, price percentile, MA deviation) computed deterministically from admitted EOD data, session-local persistence, and research-only presentation. No simulated orders, no official fundamentals auto-population, no investment advice.
implementation_slices: fair value worksheet schema validation (tqe-fair-value-worksheet/v1) with fail-closed domain checks (r > g, positive parameters, admitted target)
valuation models: pe_multiple, dividend_discount_simple, growth_adjusted_pe with exact formula implementations and formula_version echo
derived outputs: fair_value, buy_zone_ceiling, current_price with as_of, comparison vs current price
price/volume indicators: zscore (population std, close basis, explicit period), price_percentile, ma_deviation over admitted EOD data
user-supplied assumption labelling (draft / user_supplied_assumption) enforced at schema, storage, and render layers
session-local persistence of worksheets and indicator settings (flat versioned JSON, watchlist/alerts style)
research-only in-app presentation with assumption source and data status visible; no order-like or advice surface
deterministic fixture tests asserting exact indicator values and worksheet arithmetic; tests asserting no order/credential/provider code path
acceptance evidence JSON recording valuation_analysis_only scope
activation_requirements: human approval of this exact work-unit digest
p4_research_closure.py passing before and after implementation
offline replay of deterministic fixture tests
acceptance JSON with mode recorded as valuation_analysis_only; paper trading and broker connector recorded as unapproved
cannot_claim: simulated order matching or paper trading of any kind
order route, order command, or order UI control
forward EPS or forward PE from any estimate or consensus source
investment advice, recommendation, solicitation, or performance promise
user-supplied assumptions presented as official data or market consensus
worksheets or settings leaving the local machine

approval.approval_note: User approved the valuation-analysis work-unit digest after the capability 5 reshape (valuation and analysis, no simulated orders).
approval.approved_digest_note: Digest of the exact draft content (status draft_not_runnable) at approval time, computed with the p5_work_unit_digest canonicalization. Only the status flip and this approval block are post-approval changes.
